jumpIn.label: Jump-In Rule
jumpIn.description: Play exact matches out of turn

forcePlay.label: Force Play
forcePlay.description: Must play drawn card if playable

drawUntilPlayable.label: Draw Until Playable
drawUntilPlayable.description: Keep drawing until a card can be played
